top_signals.title: US Inflation Picks Up to Three-Year High, Eroding Paychecks
top_signals.summary: US inflation accelerated in May to the fastest pace in more than three years as the Iran war pushed up energy prices, outstripping Americans’ pay gains.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bond Traders Keep Bets on a Fed Hike in 2026 After CPI Data
top_signals.summary: Bond traders maintained bets that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates by the end of the year, even after a soft US core inflation reading eased pressure on Chairman Kevin Warsh to act sooner.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Man Accused of Igniting Massive Los Angeles Fire Goes on Trial
top_signals.summary: The man accused of “maliciously” starting the most destructive wildfire in Los Angeles history last year is set to face a jury over arson charges.

top_signals.title: CFTC unveils sweeping rule proposal for fast-growing prediction markets
top_signals.summary: The CFTC proposed new rules for burgeoning prediction markets that delineate what bets would be allowed under federal law.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Benchmark says Securitize ‘poised to be a positive outlier,’ sets $16 target as NYSE listing nears
top_signals.summary: Benchmark reiterates Buy on Securitize with $16 target as the company's planned NYSE listing moves into final stages.
